title: centaurea granatensis
intro: Centaurea granatensis, also known as Granada cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Centaurea granatensis include reducing swelling and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and fighting off infections. Centaurea granatensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
